title: OHP IN-PERSON APPLICATION ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: OREGON STATE DIVISION OF MEDICAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS OHP IN-PERSON APPLICATION ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps people find experts who provide in-person assistance with health insurance enrollment. Health Insurance Agents help with private insurance through the Oregon Health Insurance Marketplace (OHIM), while Community Partners, also called assisters, help with enrollment in the Oregon Health Plan (OHP). 500 Summer Street NE E-49 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Varies by service Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to locate in-person enrollment assistance. For private insurance plans, search for Health Insurance Agents. For OHP, search for Community Partners. Call ahead to confirm availability and whether walk-ins are accepted or an appointment is required. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: General Health Insurance Information/Counseling Medicaid Information/Counseling Navigator Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - OHA OMBUDS PROGRAM FOOD - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS NUTRITION SUPPORTS HOUSING/SHELTER - FLEXIBLE SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS HOME MODIFICATION HOUSING/SHELTER - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS RENTAL ASSISTANCE INFORMATION SERVICES - OREGON HEALTH PLAN CARE COORDINATION NURSE ADVICE LINE MATERIAL GOODS - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS CLIMATE SUPPORTS PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - OHP CLIENT SERVICES UNIT PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - OREGON HEALTH PLAN SPECIALTY MEDICINE - OREGON VETERAN DENTAL PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON STATE DIVISION OF MEDICAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS
